observation:
-= Bedchamber =-
You've just sauntered into a bedchamber. Let's see what's in here.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going east.


-= Bedchamber =-0/3

-= Basement =-
If you're wondering why everything seems so ordinary all of a sudden, it's because you've just walked into the basement.

Oh wow! Is that what I think it is? It is! It's a box.

There is a closed gateway leading east. There is an unblocked exit to the south. There is an exit to the west. Don't worry, it is unguarded.


-= Basement =-0/4

-= Spare Room =-
You have come into the most normal of all possible spare rooms.

You bend down to tie your shoe. When you stand up, you notice a workbench. The workbench appears to be empty.

There is an exit to the north. Don't worry, it is unguarded.


-= Spare Room =-0/5

-= Basement =-0/6

You have to open the gateway first.


-= Basement =-0/7

You can't go that way.
